title: Geekbench 7 Launches With Redesigned Multi-Core and GPU Benchmarks
excerpt: Primate Labs today announced the launch of Geekbench 7, the newest version of the popular benchmarking suite for CPU and GPU performance. ...
content_html:
Thursday July 23, 2026 10:00 am PDT by Juli Clover

Primate Labs today announced the launch of Geekbench 7, the newest version of the popular benchmarking suite for CPU and GPU performance.


There's a redesigned multi-core benchmark in Geekbench 7 that's meant to better represent how applications work in the real world. A workload only runs in multi-threaded mode if the task it models runs multi-threaded in real applications.

Primate Labs says users can expect a multi-core score that's a more relevant measure of how a device performs when doing actual work.

Along with updates to multi-core testing, a revamped GPU benchmark focuses on machine learning and content creation to reflect how GPUs are used today. The GPU benchmark has tests that track faces and apply real-time filter effects to video, upscale images with machine learning, and blur backgrounds in video conferencing streams. New GPU image editing and synthesis tests are available, like RAW image processing, LUT-based video color grading, path tracing, and fluid simulation.

Nvidia's CUDA is once again a supported API alongside OpenCL, Vulkan, and Metal.

The new version of Geekbench uses more challenging data sets to better reflect how people use their computers today. The File Compression and PDF Viewer workloads have more variation, and developer and image processing tests have more assets and different image formats.

Geekbench 7 adds media workloads for testing audio and video encoding, decoding, and processing. The Whisper speech recognition, AV1, and Opus tests mimic video conferencing, screen sharing, and content consumption workloads.

There's also a Game Physics workload that uses the Jolt Physics engine used by popular video games. Primate Labs added an expanded Photo Editor test with a richer set of real-world edits, and the Photo Library workload supports importing and processing image formats like JPEG XL and DNG.

Geekbench 7 is available for iOS, macOS, and other platforms. The app remains free for personal use, and the Pro version is 20 percent off the regular $99 price through August 6.

Popular Stories

'Apple Upgrade' Program Reportedly Launching Next Week

Apple and Klarna are partnering on a new "Apple Upgrade" leasing program set to launch in the U.S. on Tuesday, July 28, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The program will allow you to finance most iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch models, with a 24-month term for iPhones and Apple Watches and a 36-month term for iPads and Macs. Customers will be able to pay off the device early during...

iPhone 18 Pro Launching in Two Months With These 12 New Features

It is now mid-July, and that means the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are now just two months away. The devices are expected to look similar to the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro Max, but there will still be many year-over-year changes, with rumored features including a smaller Dynamic Island, 5G via satellite, and more. Apple is expected to unveil the iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max, ...

Apple to Overhaul Mac Lineup With 11 New Models

Apple is preparing to refresh every Mac it sells over the next two years, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The plans come amid a Mac resurgence, with sales projected to climb for a third consecutive year, partly thanks to a growing following among users who lean on the machines for demanding, agent-based AI workloads. The wave of new Macs will begin this fall with a refreshed...

content_html_zh:
2026 年 7 月 23 日星期四上午 10:00（太平洋夏令时） 作者： Juli Clover

Primate Labs 今天宣布推出 Geekbench 7，这是流行的 CPU 和 GPU 性能基准测试套件的最新版本。

Geekbench 7 中有一个重新设计的多核基准测试，旨在更好地代表应用程序在现实世界中的工作方式。 如果工作负载建模的任务在实际应用程序中以多线程方式运行，则工作负载仅以多线程模式运行。

Primate Labs 表示，用户可以获得多核分数，这是衡量设备在实际工作时性能的更相关指标。

除了多核测试的更新之外，改进后的 GPU 基准测试重点关注机器学习和内容创建，以反映当今 GPU 的使用方式。 GPU 基准测试的测试包括跟踪面部、将实时滤镜效果应用于视频、通过机器学习升级图像以及模糊视频会议流中的背景。 提供新的 GPU 图像编辑和合成测试，例如 RAW 图像处理、基于 LUT 的视频颜色分级、路径跟踪和流体模拟。

Nvidia 的 CUDA 再次与 OpenCL、Vulkan 和 Metal 一起成为受支持的 API。

新版本的 Geekbench 使用更具挑战性的数据集来更好地反映人们当今如何使用计算机。 文件压缩和 PDF 查看器工作负载有更多变化，开发人员和图像处理测试有更多资产和不同的图像格式。

Geekbench 7 增加了用于测试音频和视频编码、解码和处理的媒体工作负载。 Whisper 语音识别、AV1 和 Opus 测试模拟视频会议、屏幕共享和内容消费工作负载。

还有一个游戏物理工作负载，它使用流行视频游戏所使用的 Jolt 物理引擎。 Primate Labs 添加了扩展的照片编辑器测试，具有更丰富的实际编辑集，并且照片库工作负载支持导入和处理 JPEG XL 和 DNG 等图像格式。

Geekbench 7 适用于 iOS、macOS 和其他平台。 该应用程序仍然免费供个人使用，截至 8 月 6 日，专业版价格比常规价格 99 美元便宜 20%。

热门故事

据报道“苹果升级”计划下周启动

据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 报道，Apple 和 Klarna 正在合作开展一项新的“Apple Upgrade”租赁计划，该计划将于 7 月 28 日星期二在美国推出。 该计划将允许您为大多数 iPhone、iPad、Mac 和 Apple Watch 型号提供融资，iPhone 和 Apple Watch 的期限为 24 个月，iPad 和 Mac 的期限为 36 个月。 客户将能够在...期间提前还清设备费用。

iPhone 18 Pro 两个月后发布 12 项新功能

现在已经是 7 月中旬了，这意味着距离 iPhone 18 Pro 和 iPhone 18 Pro Max 上市只有两个月了。 预计这些设备看起来与 iPhone 17 Pro 和 iPhone 17 Pro Max 类似，但仍将有许多同比变化，传闻中的功能包括更小的动态岛、通过卫星的 5G 等等。 苹果预计将推出 iPhone 18 Pro、iPhone 18 Pro Max...

Apple 将以 11 款新机型彻底改变 Mac 产品阵容

据彭博社的马克·古尔曼称，苹果准备在未来两年内更新其销售的每台 Mac。 这些计划是在 Mac 复苏之际推出的，预计销量将连续第三年攀升，部分原因是越来越多的用户依赖这些机器来处理要求较高的、基于代理的人工智能工作负载。 新 Mac 的浪潮将于今年秋季开始，并配备更新的...
